Intrude On Privacy of Others CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the whether the resident's symptoms significantly intrudes on the privacy or activity of others. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
^=Blank(skip pattern)
172 E0600C_BHVR_DSRUPT_ENVRMNT_CD E0600C_BHVR_DSRUPT_ENVRMNT_CD E0600C Behavior Impact on Others: Disrupt Care or Living Environment CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the whether the resident's symptoms significantly disrupt the care or living environment.
